name: @promovolve/banner-bootstrap
description: Publisher-facing bootstrap script — discovers ad slot placements on the page, fires a single batch /v1/serve/batch request, distributes winners to their slot divs. The sole integration primitive for publishers; the <expandable-magazine-banner> custom element is loaded as an internal renderer from the winner's bannerScriptUrl.

scripts.release: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run fanout && npm run publish:r2
